title: Halloween Pumpkin Jar, Candy Glass, Jewellery Organiser, Transparent Biscuit Storage Jar with Lid, Candy Bowl for Table Decoration (Clear, 10 x 10 cm)

Material: the candy jar is made of glass, carefully processed, it is durable even in daily use.
Features: The edges of the candy box are smooth transparent, you can always see the contents of the candy bowl with lid.
Function: the candy bowl can be used for sweets, chocolate, biscuits, jewellery even jewels and adds charm to any table.
Use: This transparent pumpkin shaped candy bowl is ideal for personal use for events such as weddings, receptions, buffets, holidays, family celebrations, parties of all kinds.
